meta.libraryPositioning: Narrow connector-focused index for selecting relationship arrows from the main arrow template library. Use this before scanning the full arrows_index.json when a page needs node links, orthogonal routes, hub exchange, feedback loops, architecture buses, or dependency lanes.

usage.primary_rule: Use connector_index.json for relationship/link arrows; use arrows_index.json for the full arrow library.
usage.path_rule: Each entry path is relative to skills/ppt-master/templates/arrows/.
usage.executor_rule: When a connector template is selected for a generated slide, copy or adapt the SVG geometry into the page SVG while preserving supported marker heads and simple paths for PPTX editability.

core_connector_templates.title: Core connector templates
core_connector_templates.use_for: Small curated built-in templates for ordinary node links, dependency buses, layer connectors, side rails, and data-flow swimlanes.
core_connector_templates.selection_hint: Start here when you need a reliable general-purpose connector before searching the larger pack families.
core_connector_templates.skip_for: Large PPT-style block arrows or decorative process chains.

entries.summary: Pick for stacked architecture diagrams where horizontal divider bands need upward and downward connectors between rows. Skip for freeform workflow pages without layers (use data_flow_swimlanes).
Pick for thin straight, vertical, bidirectional, and orthogonal connector arrows between existing nodes. Skip for wide phase chains (use block_chevron_sequence).
Pick for 4-step feedback loops, PDCA-style cycles, or iterative closed-loop governance. Skip for linear progressions (use block_chevron_sequence).

Pick for a horizontal dotted bus line with multiple upward tap arrows connecting a lower capability row to upper cards, like architecture support relationships. Skip for solid process chains (use block_chevron_sequence).
Pick for dotted orthogonal dependency lines with elbows, vertical taps, and arrowheads across multiple cards. Skip for simple straight arrows (use connector_arrow_set).
Pick for cross-lane data movement, platform handoffs, or system integration flows where each arrow should be labeled. Skip for business process nodes without lanes (use process_flow).
Pick for architecture pages needing left or right side rail arrows that bracket multiple rows and indicate end-to-end coverage. Skip for internal card-to-card links (use connector_arrow_set).
Pick for vertical up/down feedback between two stacked layers, with separate ascent and return arrows. Skip for closed circular loops (use cycle_feedback_arrows).

orthogonal_route_connectors.title: Orthogonal route connectors
orthogonal_route_connectors.use_for: Right-angle, elbow, branch, route-turn, return, and module-to-module connector paths.
orthogonal_route_connectors.selection_hint: Best default for architecture pages with cards, modules, layers, and dependency links that need to bend around content.
orthogonal_route_connectors.skip_for: Central hub-spoke exchange maps or circular feedback loops.

node_link_connectors.use_for: Thin straight, curved, fork, merge, loop-back, and dashed connector lines between existing nodes.

node_link_connectors.skip_for: Wide structural arrows, chevron phase flows, or hub-spoke maps.
